title: fix: switch gptimage endpoints to West US 3
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: A change of scenery
gist.blurb: Our GPT image models packed their bags and moved to the US West Coast. Turns out the previous servers were a bit too strict about what constitutes art.
gist.summary: Migrated the Azure endpoints for GPT image models to West US 3 to bypass overly aggressive content policy blocks in the previous region.
gist.impact: Image generation for gpt-image-1-mini and gpt-image-1.5 is back to being reliable and block-free.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot moving a glowing canvas or server from a snowy biome (Sweden) to a sunny beach biome (West US).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny sunglasses, carrying a glowing picture frame from a snowy pine tree patch to a sunny beach biome. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
